pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 language rules, preventing the use of Java 17 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries targeting Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api dependency with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation packages are removed from the JDK in Java 11+ and often unavailable in modern Jakarta EE environments; using the Jakarta namespace ensures compatibility with modern runtimes and libraries.
